declarations.name: WebwriterWordPuzzle

cssParts.description: Container for puzzle type selector (visible in edit mode)
cssParts.name: options

cssParts.description: Container for the puzzle grid and action buttons
cssParts.name: grid-wrapper

slots.description: Default slot for additional content (rarely used)

members.name: _wordsClues
members.description:
Array of words and their associated clues for the puzzle.

Each WordClue object contains:
- `word`: The word to place in the puzzle (required)
- `clueText`: The clue text for crosswords (optional for word search)
- `x`, `y`: Grid coordinates (auto-generated during puzzle creation)
- `across`: Direction for crosswords (auto-generated)
- `clueNumber`: Clue number for crosswords (auto-generated)

members.name: type
members.description:
Type of word puzzle to display and interact with.

- **"crossword"**: Traditional crossword with numbered clues across and down
- **"find-the-words"**: Word search where players find hidden words in a grid

Changing this property will update the UI to show appropriate controls and layout.

members.name: setWords

parameters.name: words
parameters.description: Array of WordClue objects containing words and optional clues

parameters.name: regenerate
parameters.description: Whether to automatically regenerate the puzzle layout (default: true)

members.description:
Sets the words and clues for the puzzle and triggers regeneration.

This is the main API method for programmatically setting puzzle content.
It updates the word list and automatically regenerates the puzzle layout
if in crossword mode.

members.name: addWord

parameters.name: regenerate
parameters.description: Whether to regenerate the puzzle (default: true)

members.description:
Adds a single word to the existing puzzle.

Convenience method for adding individual words without replacing
the entire word list. Automatically triggers puzzle regeneration
for crosswords.

members.name: removeWord

parameters.name: word
parameters.description: The word text to remove (case insensitive)

parameters.name: regenerate
parameters.description: Whether to regenerate the puzzle (default: true)

members.description: Removes a word from the puzzle by word text.

members.name: clearWords
generatePuzzle
members.description:
Manually triggers puzzle generation for crosswords.

Usually called automatically when words are modified, but can be
called manually if needed. Only affects crossword puzzles.

@example Manual generation
```typescript
puzzle.generatePuzzle();
```

members.name: generateCrossword

events.description: Triggered when crossword generation is requested
events.name: generateCw

events.description: Triggered when user selects a cell or clue in crossword mode
events.name: set-context

events.description: Triggered when word/clue data is updated
events.name: set-words-clues
